tweets.text: Watching Skins with Taylyn.
Only Skin - Joanna Newsom -- I just checked, and this star has 5 stars. I wanna give it more. I lpove it so damn much.
Daisy just left. Met her dad. Shook his hand firmly. Forgot to look him in the eye though. Thankfully I got a second chance.
I am unable to handle how these non-journalism people use the word deadline... like they are gonna "move" the deadline? you can move a deadline??? working in breaking news clearly broke me

@bluemonq They gave me the whole test, but the dude kinda gave me a pass on my shoddy parallel parking deal. He jus wanted America to drive.
SOMEBODY HAS A LICENSE
Got my certificate. Back at the road test place. Waiting some more. It will be outrageously obnoxious if I do not pass it.
Waiting in the road test line. Haven't talked to anybody and I'm still skeptical that I'll be able to take the test anyway.

I wondered to myself "I wonder if there is like a d3.scale for music?" and... here's a better version that uses Tonal.js for picking scales and chords and is turning up way more interesting and surprising results https://t.co/2TMBriolfg
If you know more about music than I do, you can adjust the possible notes (and octaves) it picks from here: https://t.co/Y5R10ANYKr
Continuing to experiment with Tone.js, Chance.js, and generative music on Glitch https://t.co/Ojl5eP4wMa

@mdavidallen I have made some progress using rollup to build browser and node versions of my original script.. but I need to rewrite these classes so the export can be used properly https://t.co/SOkkXM4sOf

@mdavidallen I want to use https://t.co/3Dv1Zi3jv3 because they automatically host the npm modules in a way I can access from Glitch (or Observable or my own site) - I am trying to build all of that on top of my existing node library without breaking my old art scripts that use it 😳

@mdavidallen It generates the art on the server on node (so it can run on heroku on a schedule) which is handy. But I also want to be able to show the scripts running in-progress in real-time (and maybe expose controls) on something like Glitch https://t.co/g6S7PX22V8

@mdavidallen Appreciate all this help! Spent last night reading up on stuff and made some progress. What I'm trying to do is have a relatively simple library to structure my generative art stuff. Right now @ejfox/four-seventeen is powering https://t.co/eYJy8kZZHS https://t.co/seZnnP7QBv
the bodega guy says that I shouldn't feel bad about not doing anything but eating sandwiches all weekend and I really appreciate him for that
